settings.text:
Welcome to our FAQ, we are so happy to have you here and as a client.
We have tried to answer the most common questions.

settings.heading: Orders
settings.text: Below are some of are common questions about orders

settings.title: Is there a minimum order requirement?
settings.text: No. We do not carry a minimum order.

settings.title: Are there price breaks for larger orders?
settings.text: Yes. We do offer price breaks on large quantities.

settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.text: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, and company purchase orders (POs) for verified business accounts. All transactions are secure and encrypted.

settings.title: Can I modify or cancel my order after placing it?
settings.text: Yes, you can! Contact us immediately at order@holkieusa.com, our team will check your order status and assist you with any modifications.

settings.title: I need a rush order for a project. Can you expedite it?
settings.text: We understand urgent needs! Please note “RUSH ORDER” in the comments at checkout and email us immediately. We’ll do our best to prioritize your order and discuss expedited shipping options to meet your deadline.

settings.heading: Products
settings.text: Below are some common questions about our products

settings.title: What industries do your casters work for?
settings.text: Automotive, Medical, Retail, Pharmaceutical, Aerospace, General Warehouse, Material Handling, and more. This website has our best selling items so if you can’t find what you’re looking for contact us because we probably have what you need.

settings.title: How long are casters good for?
settings.text: Some Casters can have lifespans as long as 30 years. All of this depends on the environment, proper use, and maintenance.

settings.title: What is the weight capacity on a caster?
settings.text: The weight capacity of a caster is the amount of load the caster can carry without failure or premature wear.

settings.title: What is the difference between a standard brake and a "Total-Lock" brake?
settings.text: A Total-Lock stops the wheel from rolling and keeps the caster from spinning. A standard brake will just keep the wheel from rolling.

settings.title: What should I do if I can’t find the item I need?
settings.text: We couldn't possibly put every caster combination on the site, if you can't find what you are looking for, drop an email.

settings.heading: Shipping & Returns
settings.text: Below are some common questions about shipping, returns, and exchanges

settings.title: What is your return policy if my item arrives damaged or defective?
settings.text: If your caster wheels arrive damaged, defective, or incorrect, we offer a free return or exchange with a full refund at no cost to you. Simply contact us at order@holkieusa.com within 7 days of receiving your order, and our customer service team will assist you promptly.

settings.title: Can I return an item if I simply change my mind or ordered the wrong size?
settings.text: Yes, you may request a return for non-quality reasons (such as change of mind or wrong size) within 30 days of delivery. However, the return shipping costs will be your responsibility, and items must be brand new, unused, and in unopened original packaging to qualify for a full refund.

settings.title: What condition must my return be in to get a full refund?
settings.text:
To receive a full refund, the returned product must be:

  • Unused with no signs of installation or wear.
  • In its original, unopened packaging.
  • Include all accessories and manuals.
    If the item is opened, used, or incomplete, we may issue a partial refund based on its condition after inspection.

settings.title: Do I need permission to send a return?
settings.text: Yes. All returns must be authorized by Holkie before you ship them back. To request a Return Authorization, please email us at order@holkieusa.com. We will then provide you with the correct return instructions and warehouse address. Unauthorized returns will not be accepted.

settings.title: How long does it take to get my refund after returning an item?
settings.text: Once we receive and inspect your returned item, we will issue the refund to your original payment method. Please allow 5–7 business days for the refund to appear in your account. We will notify you once the refund is completed.

settings.title: Are there any items that cannot be returned?
settings.text:
Yes, the following items are not eligible for return:

  • Used casters or wheels with visible wear.
  • Items damaged due to misuse or improper installation.
  • Custom orders or special-size products.
  • Items returned without prior authorization.

settings.title: Who pays for return shipping if the return is my fault?
settings.text: For returns due to non-quality reasons (like change of mind), the customer is responsible for the return shipping costs. For returns due to our error (damaged, defective, or incorrect item), we cover all return costs.

settings.title: What if I opened the box but didn’t use the product? Can I still return it?
settings.text: If the original packaging is opened, the item may no longer qualify for a full refund. However, if the product itself is unused and in perfect condition, you may still be eligible for a partial refund after our inspection. We recommend contacting us at order@holkieusa.com to discuss your specific situation.

settings.heading: Didn’t find your answer?
settings.text: Don't hestitate to contact us
